hook.summary: A grainy, black-and-white 'horror' clip bait-and-switches into colorful 3D hide-and-seek gameplay.
hook.visual_action: Shaky, low-quality footage of a dark room cuts to a bright, stylized 3D bedroom where a character transforms into an object.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey

scene_flow: Starts with a fake 'scary' black-and-white video clip to grab attention.
Transitions to a 3D bedroom environment where players are hiding as objects.
A police officer character performs a dance while searching for hidden players.
The player character uses a trampoline to jump onto a bed and hide next to a teddy bear.
The seeker continues to look around the room while the player remains undetected.
on_screen_text: Antony Lore: Somewhere, a better hiding spot is crying
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy social-media-style humor and hide-and-seek gameplay.
